# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

parameters:
    virtualMachineName: '{your_vm_name}'
    resourceGroupName: '{resourcegroup name here}'   // specify or leave blank for default-storage account group (best practice is to use your own unique, non empty string)  -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    location: '{location here}'   // specify or leave blank for default-storage account group (best practice is to use your own unique, non empty string)  -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    vmSize: '{your_vm_size}' // For example Standard_D2s v3 (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    adminUsername: '{your_admin_username}'  // Admin user account name to connect (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    adminPasswordOrKey: '{your_admin_password}'  // Admin user password/key (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at OS Disk size & Key Vault settings etc., must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    adminPublicKey: '{your_admin_public_ssh}'  // Admin user public SSH key (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    sourceImagePublicID: '{your image_public ID}'  // Source Image public Id from Azure marketplace (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    sourceImageSKU: '{your_image SK U}'  // Source Image sku from Azure marketplace (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    sourceImageVersion: '{your_image version}'  // Source Image Version from Azure marketplace (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    enableMonitoring: '{monitor_status or false}'  // Enable Monitor feature(true/false), default is enabled (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    enableLogging: '{log_status or false}'  // Enable Log feature(true/false), default is enabled (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    enableTunnel: '{tunnel_status or false}'  // Enable Tunnels feature(true/false), default is enabled (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    enableIdler: '{idle_status or false}'  // Enable Idleness feature(true/false), default is enabled (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    diskEncryptionEnabled: '{disk_encryption}'  // Enable or Disable Disk Encryption(true/false), default is disabled (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    keyVaultEndpoint: '{key_vault}'  // Key vault endpoint for disk encryption (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    keyVaultKeyName: '{key_name}'  // Key vault client Id for disk encryption (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    adminPasswordKeyName: '{key_name}'  // Admin user password Key Name from Azure keyvault (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    sourceImageResourceGroupName: '{source_image resource group}'  // Source Image Resource Group Name (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    sourceImageResourceName: '{source_image resource name}'  // Source Image Resource ID Name (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    dataDisksCount: '{data_disks_count}'  // Number of Data Disks to attach (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    dataDisksSizeGB: '{data_disks_size}'  // Size GB for each Data Disk (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    dataDisksStorageType: '{data_disks_storage}'  // Storage type for each Data Disk (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    dataDisksSourceImagePublicID: '{data_disks source image public id}'  // Source Image Public ID for each Data Disk (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    dataDisksSourceImageSKU: '{data_disks source image sku}'  // Source Image SKU for each Data Disk (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    dataDisksSourceImageVersion: '{data_disks source image version}'  // Source Image Version for each Data Disk (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    dataDisksLun: '{data_disks lun}'  // Logical Unit Number for each Data Disk (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    imageAlias: '{image_alias}'  // Image Alias Name for source images that are used to launch instance (optional parameters like these, you can add more) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template deployment
    networkSecurityGroupName: '{nsg name}'  // Network Security Group Name for VM(Optional Parameters Like This Can Be Added Here If Not Provided) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template
    appGatewayName: '{app_gateways name}'  // Application Gateway Name for outbound connections(Optional Parameters Like This Can Be Added Here If Not Provided) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template
    dnsLabelPrefix: '{dns_label}'  // DNS label for VM(Optional Parameters Like This Can Be Added Here If Not Provided) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template
    storageAccountType: '{storage account type }'  // Storage Account Type (Example Standard_LRS or Basic_ZRS etc.)(Optional Parameters Like This Can Be Added Here If Not Provided) -- optional; defaults when not provided. - Optional parameter as described above at the top of this file and must be set manually beforehand in ARM template
